name: speckit-pro
description: Skill-backed Spec-Driven Development workflows for Codex, including archive-aware autopilot startup, coaching, setup, Codex subagent installation, status dashboards, and PR review resolution.

interface.shortDescription: Spec-driven workflows and Codex subagent install support
interface.longDescription: Skill-backed Spec-Driven Development for Codex. Each Codex skill ships its own `agents/openai.yaml` metadata sidecar, and SpecKit Pro also bundles Codex custom-agent TOML templates plus a Codex-only install skill because Codex still registers custom agents from `.codex/agents/` or `~/.codex/agents/` rather than directly from the plugin bundle.
defaultPrompt: Use SpecKit Pro to install the bundled Codex subagents and tell me if I need to restart Codex.
Use SpecKit Pro to coach Spec-Driven Development and explain the next step for my current spec.
Use SpecKit Pro to set up a spec worktree and prepare the workflow for autopilot.
Use SpecKit Pro to run a populated workflow file with the installed SpecKit Codex agents.
Use SpecKit Pro to check whether the archive extension is installed and whether Archive Sweep cleanup is safe.
